title: Mom Realizes Her Daughter Just Decapitated Someone

beats.description: Dramatic opening showing the mother's realization and immediate police bodycam of the decapitation scene.
911 dispatch call, police arrival, forced entry, and initial discovery of the victim's body in the garage.
Scene processing, initial detainment of Kiara, arrival of the victim's mother, and location of Isaac at a nearby store.
Detective Vigil receives scene briefing, learns relationship dynamics and prior domestic battery charge, followed by sponsor segment.
Isaac's first interrogation where he plays the traumatized victim, maps the scene, and establishes a timeline.
Kiara's interrogation reveals her self-diagnosed DID, inconsistent memories, mentions of a violent 'Ghost' organization, and initial blame-shifting to Isaac.
Detectives present Isaac's phone messages, exposing the conspiracy and planning; Isaac's facade crumbles and he confesses to encouraging the murder.
Brief interviews with both families, confirmation of first-degree murder charges, and concluding narrative wrap-up.

_analysis_metadata.transcript_preview: Tara McCaulay sits beside her 19-year-old daughter, Kiara. Unbeknownst to her, both of their lives are about to change forever. >> How's my houseing crime? >> There's a deceased person in your [clears throat] garage. >> That's why it's a crime scene. >> There's a body in there. >> Stand up for me. >> Kiara is a deranged teenage killer. She just brutally killed her ex-girlfriend with a 3-ft long sword. The body lies in her mother's [music] home just feet away. But this discovery of a body would be just the start. The investigation that followed would reveal a vile teenage couple whose actions left officers, family members, and detectives [music] ...
